hero.headline: We only publish work we can put a number on.
hero.subtext: No capability decks, no trophy logos. {{BRAND}} keeps a public ledger of engagements: the problem as the client stated it, what we actually

items.title: A number must be at stake
items.desc: If the problem cannot be stated as a metric someone is accountable for, we decline. Vague mandates produce vague

items.title: We measure before we touch anything
items.desc: Two weeks of baseline instrumentation comes first, every time. Otherwise the after has nothing honest to be compared

items.title: Your team does the work with us
items.desc: Maximum two of us on site. We build the fix with the people who will own it, so the result survives our departure.

items.title: The result gets written down, either way
items.desc: Every engagement ends with a signed results memo, including the ones that missed. Three of the forty-one entries in our

items.title: Fulfilment backlog at a specialty grocer
items.desc: Online orders promised in 2 days were shipping in 6.5 on average. Refund requests tied to lateness had reached 11

items.title: Claims cycle time at a regional insurer
items.desc: Simple motor claims took 23 days to settle against a regulator expectation of 10. Adjusters spent an audited 40 percent

about.body: SafeArc Insurance is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Life Insurance
features: Protection matched to your family's needs.

items.name: Claim Support
features: Help with paperwork when it matters most.

items.a: Yes — same-day callouts when urgency demands it.
Quotes are free within our service area.
We cover the city and nearby neighbourhoods.
